name: ironmem
description: Rust MCP memory backend for Codex with semantic search, knowledge graph, automatic migrate-or-init bootstrap, and incremental workspace mining.

interface.longDescription: Local Rust memory backend with semantic search, KG lookups, mempalace migration, initial auto-mine, and incremental updates on hooks.
defaultPrompt: Before answering questions about prior work, decisions, project history, or people, call search or KG tools first.
After important progress or decisions, write durable summaries back into ironmem.
Use status at session start to load memory overview and protocol guidance.
